zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位窄幅震荡偏多整理
zh.content:
当前SOL高位窄幅震荡，价格围绕68-69整理，仍运行于均线之上，短期偏多但上行动能减弱，进入整理蓄势阶段

MACD微正，显示多头动能仍在但扩张有限，价格稳站20日均线，短线多空博弈加剧，动量偏中性略强

下方支撑67.7（20日均线），进一步66.8；上方阻力69.1，突破或上看70整数关口

建议回调低吸为主，守67.7维持多头思路；放量突破69.1可顺势做多，区间内高抛低吸控风险

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading in a tight consolidation around 68.74, showing a marginal 24-hour decline of 0.30%. Price action remains compressed between 68.70 and 69.09, indicating short-term equilibrium after recent volatility. The broader intraday structure suggests a mild corrective phase rather than a strong reversal, as sellers fail to extend downside momentum while buyers continue defending the lower boundary of the current range.

The MACD reading at 0.0577 remains slightly positive, suggesting underlying bullish momentum is still intact, though gradually weakening. Without RSI data available, price behavior relative to the 20-day SMA at 67.739 becomes more relevant. SOL is holding above this dynamic support, which keeps the medium-term trend constructive. However, the flattening momentum profile signals hesitation and a lack of strong directional conviction.

Immediate support is located at 68.70, followed by a stronger structural level at 67.70, which aligns closely with the SMA20. A decisive break below this zone could expose downside toward 66.50. On the upside, resistance is found at 69.09, with a more significant barrier near 70.00–70.50 where repeated rejections may occur. A breakout above this area would be required to confirm renewed bullish continuation.

Traders may prefer range-bound strategies while SOL/USD remains trapped between 67.70 and 69.10, favoring longs near support and partial profit-taking into resistance. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 70 or below 67.70 before committing to directional positions. Given the current low volatility environment, tight stop-losses are essential to manage risk and avoid whipsaw movements within this consolidation phase.
